DECLARE @currentDatabaseCompatibilityLevel TINYINT;
DECLARE @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel TINYINT;
DECLARE @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText varchar(10);
DECLARE @engineEdition INT;
DECLARE @productMajorVersion INT;
DECLARE @productVersion NVARCHAR(128);

SELECT @currentDatabaseCompatibilityLevel = compatibility_level FROM sys.databases WHERE [name] = 'Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1'

SET @productVersion = Convert (VARCHAR (128), serverproperty('ProductVersion'))
SET @engineEdition = Convert(INT, serverproperty('EngineEdition'))
SET @productMajorVersion = CONVERT(INT, SUBSTRING(@productVersion, 1, CHARINDEX('.', @productVersion) - 1))


-- 5: Azure SQL Database, 8: Azure SQL Database Managed Instance
IF (@engineEdition = 5 OR @engineEdition = 8)
BEGIN
    SET @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel = 150
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    -- Mapping based on https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/sql/t-sql/statements/alter-database-transact-sql-compatibility-level?view=sql-server-ver15#arguments
    -- This list will grow as new versions of SQL Server are released
    SET @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel = CASE @productMajorVersion
                                                 WHEN 13 THEN 130
                                                 WHEN 14 THEN 140
                                                 WHEN 15 THEN 150
                                                 WHEN 16 THEN 160
                                                 WHEN 17 THEN 170
                                                 ELSE NULL
                                             END

    IF (@desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel is NULL)
    BEGIN
        PRINT 'Warning: ' + @productVersion + ' represents an unknown version of SQL Server. Falling back to the lowest supported COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL'
        SET @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel = 130
    END
END

SET @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText = Convert(nvarchar(10), @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel)

PRINT 'Current COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL for Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1 is set to ' +  Convert(nvarchar(10), @currentDatabaseCompatibilityLevel)
PRINT 'Ensuring COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL for Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1 is set to ' + @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText

IF (@currentDatabaseCompatibilityLevel < @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevel)
BEGIN
    DECLARE @sql nvarchar(MAX);
    SET @sql = N'ALTER DATABASE [Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1] SET COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL = ' + @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText;
	EXECUTE (@sql)

    PRINT 'COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL for Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1 changed to ' + @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText
END
ELSE
BEGIN
	PRINT 'COMPATIBILITY_LEVEL for Octopus.Server.IntegrationTests-1 is already ' + @desiredDatabaseCompatibilityLevelAsText  + N' or higher'
END
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end

-- This removes the namespace prefixes if needed. Don't remove
-- This script ALWAYS runs. If we moved it to "UpgradeScriptsPre", then the upgrade summary would be wrong since this runs after the summary is generated
PRINT 'Preparing to remove namespace prefix from script names in the [SchemaVersions] table...'
IF EXISTS(SELECT [name] FROM sys.tables WHERE [name] = 'SchemaVersions' AND [schema_id] = SCHEMA_ID('dbo'))
BEGIN
  PRINT 'Table [SchemaVersions] exists, inspecting script names...'
  IF EXISTS(SELECT * FROM [dbo].[SchemaVersions] WHERE [ScriptName] LIKE 'Octopus.Core.UpgradeScripts.%')
    BEGIN
      PRINT 'Removing namespace prefix...'
      UPDATE [dbo].[SchemaVersions] SET [ScriptName] = REPLACE([ScriptName], 'Octopus.Core.UpgradeScripts.', '')
      PRINT 'Namespace prefixes removed.'
    END
  ELSE
  BEGIN
    PRINT 'Script names are not prefixed, nothing to do.'
  END
END
ELSE
BEGIN
  PRINT 'Table SchemaVersions doesn''t exist, nothing to do.'
END
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end

-- This script truncates the CacheKey table each time Server runs.
PRINT 'Preparing to truncate [CacheKey] table...'
IF EXISTS(SELECT [name] FROM sys.tables WHERE [name] = 'CacheKey' AND [schema_id] = SCHEMA_ID('dbo'))
BEGIN
  PRINT 'Table [CacheKey] exists, truncating...'
  TRUNCATE TABLE [dbo].[CacheKey]
END
ELSE
BEGIN
  PRINT 'Table [CacheKey] doesn''t exist, nothing to do.'
END

SELECT [u4].[Id], [u4].[AccessTokensNotBefore], [u4].[Created], [u4].[DataVersion], [u4].[DisplayName], [u4].[EmailAddress], [u4].[IdentificationToken], [u4].[IsActive], [u4].[IsService], [u4].[LastModified], [u4].[PasswordHashed], [u4].[RefreshTokensNotBefore], [u4].[Username], [s].[Id], [s].[Provider], [s].[UserId], [s].[Id0], [s].[IsIdentifyingClaim], [s].[IsServerSideOnly], [s].[Key], [s].[UserIdentityId], [s].[Value], [s0].[Id], [s0].[LastUpdated], [s0].[Provider], [s0].[UserId], [s0].[Id0], [s0].[GroupId], [s0].[UserExternalProviderId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [u].[Id], [u].[AccessTokensNotBefore], [u].[Created], [u].[DataVersion], [u].[DisplayName], [u].[EmailAddress], [u].[IdentificationToken], [u].[IsActive], [u].[IsService], [u].[LastModified], [u].[PasswordHashed], [u].[RefreshTokensNotBefore], [u].[Username]
    FROM [User] AS [u]
    WHERE [u].[Id] = @id
) AS [u4]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u0].[Id], [u0].[Provider], [u0].[UserId], [u1].[Id] AS [Id0], [u1].[IsIdentifyingClaim], [u1].[IsServerSideOnly], [u1].[Key], [u1].[UserIdentityId], [u1].[Value]
    FROM [UserIdentity] AS [u0]
    LEFT JOIN [UserIdentityClaim] AS [u1] ON [u0].[Id] = [u1].[UserIdentityId]
) AS [s] ON [u4].[Id] = [s].[UserId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [u2].[Id], [u2].[LastUpdated], [u2].[Provider], [u2].[UserId], [u3].[Id] AS [Id0], [u3].[GroupId], [u3].[UserExternalProviderId]
    FROM [UserExternalProvider] AS [u2]
    LEFT JOIN [UserExternalProviderSecurityGroup] AS [u3] ON [u2].[Id] = [u3].[UserExternalProviderId]
) AS [s0] ON [u4].[Id] = [s0].[UserId]
ORDER BY [u4].[Id], [s].[Id], [s].[Id0], [s0].[Id]
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end

UNION

SELECT [p].[Id], [p].[AllowIgnoreChannelRules], [p].[AutoCreateRelease], [p].[ClonedFromProjectId], [p].[CombineHealthAndSyncStatusInDashboardLiveStatus], [p].[DataVersion], [p].[DeploymentProcessId], [p].[DeprovisioningRunbookId], [p].[DiscreteChannelRelease], [p].[ExpiringFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p].[IsDisabled], [p].[Json], [p].[LastModified], [p].[LifecycleId], [p].[Name], [p].[PrimaryFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p].[ProjectGroupId], [p].[ProvisioningRunbookId], [p].[Slug], [p].[SpaceId], [p].[VariableSetId], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[LibraryVariableSetId], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[TagId]
FROM [Project] AS [p]
LEFT JOIN [ProjectLibraryVariableSet] AS [p0] ON [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN [ProjectTag] AS [p1] ON [p].[Id] = [p1].[ProjectId]
WHERE [p].[SpaceId] = @spaceId AND [p].[Id] = @ids1
ORDER BY [p].[Id], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[LibraryVariableSetId], [p1].[ProjectId]

SELECT [p2].[Id], [p2].[AllowIgnoreChannelRules], [p2].[AutoCreateRelease], [p2].[ClonedFromProjectId], [p2].[CombineHealthAndSyncStatusInDashboardLiveStatus], [p2].[DataVersion], [p2].[DeploymentProcessId], [p2].[DeprovisioningRunbookId], [p2].[DiscreteChannelRelease], [p2].[ExpiringFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p2].[IsDisabled], [p2].[Json], [p2].[LastModified], [p2].[LifecycleId], [p2].[Name], [p2].[PrimaryFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p2].[ProjectGroupId], [p2].[ProvisioningRunbookId], [p2].[Slug], [p2].[SpaceId], [p2].[VariableSetId], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[LibraryVariableSetId], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[TagId]
FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[AllowIgnoreChannelRules], [p].[AutoCreateRelease], [p].[ClonedFromProjectId], [p].[CombineHealthAndSyncStatusInDashboardLiveStatus], [p].[DataVersion], [p].[DeploymentProcessId], [p].[DeprovisioningRunbookId], [p].[DiscreteChannelRelease], [p].[ExpiringFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p].[IsDisabled], [p].[Json], [p].[LastModified], [p].[LifecycleId], [p].[Name], [p].[PrimaryFeatureToggleClientIdentifierSigningKey], [p].[ProjectGroupId], [p].[ProvisioningRunbookId], [p].[Slug], [p].[SpaceId], [p].[VariableSetId]
    FROM [Project] AS [p]
    WHERE [p].[Id] = @id
) AS [p2]
LEFT JOIN [ProjectLibraryVariableSet] AS [p0] ON [p2].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN [ProjectTag] AS [p1] ON [p2].[Id] = [p1].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [p2].[Id], [p0].[ProjectId], [p0].[LibraryVariableSetId], [p1].[ProjectId]
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end

SELECT DISTINCT [s].[ConcurrencyTag]
FROM [ServerTask] AS [s] WITH (NOLOCK)
LEFT JOIN [Interruption] AS [i] ON [s].[Id] = [i].[TaskId]
WHERE [s].[ConcurrencyTag] IS NOT NULL AND ([s].[State] IN (N'Executing', N'Cancelling') OR ([i].[Id] IS NOT NULL AND [i].[Status] = N'Pending' AND [s].[State] = N'Queued' AND [i].[BlockConcurrentTasks] = CAST(1 AS bit)))
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end

SELECT [s].[Id], [s].[Weight], [s].[QueueTime]
FROM [ServerTask] AS [s]
WHERE [s].[SpaceId] = @spaceId AND [s].[Id] <> @task_Id AND [s].[Name] = @task_Name AND [s].[ConcurrencyTag] = @task_ConcurrencyTag AND ([s].[Weight] > @task_Weight_Value OR ([s].[Weight] = @task_Weight_Value AND [s].[QueueTime] < @task_QueueTime)) AND [s].[State] IN (N'New', N'Queued') AND NOT EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM [Interruption] AS [i]
    WHERE [i].[SpaceId] = @spaceId7 AND [i].[TaskId] = [s].[Id])
Implement executions telemetry for process execution start/end
